releaseNotes:
Infra 0.3.0 — July 2026

- Easier self-hosting: Infra now ships as a prebuilt container image with a complete step-by-step setup guide — download, set two values, and run.
- Navigation & UX polish: breadcrumbs on every detail and form page, a reorganized Settings hub, and a single unified "Add" action for linked records.
- Automatic updates: instances now record their version automatically on deploy (no manual step), and admins see an update banner with release notes and a download link.
- Security & platform: upgraded the underlying application framework and cleared all high-severity dependency advisories.
- Cloud storage: added Azure Blob Storage as a durable file-storage option for cloud and multi-host deployments.
